entries.llmRawResponse:
[
  {
    "image_prompt": "Eye-level medium shot, static frame. 2 distinct characters with completely different outfits and features, standing separately with clear space between them: On the left of the frame, a young woman with a heart-shaped face, almond eyes, refined nose, soft lips, arched brows, and brown hair, wearing a light green top and cream cardigan, holds a pale blue umbrella in her hand, fingers wrapped around the handle; she stands with her chin lifted, lips curved in a small tentative smile, her gaze meeting the man's eyes with a soft questioning look. On the right of the frame, a young man with an angular face, sharp jawline, high cheekbones, slanted phoenix eyes, dark brown eyes, and thin lips, black short hair messy and windswept, wearing a dark blue hoodie over a white t-shirt, stands attentively, eyes fixed on her, lips slightly parted, shoulders squared. The scene is set at a café entrance under an awning on a rainy day; background includes the café door, a window on the right, a menu board on the left, a puddle on the ground, and a misty city street with passersby under umbrellas. Soft key light from above with cool fill, casting soft shadows, cool melancholic blue color tone, medium depth of field keeping both characters in focus. Artwork in 2.5D semi-realistic CG style with Iray skin rendering, realistic physical light and shadow, high-detail skin surface, translucent rosy skin texture, cinematic render quality. Crystal clear eyes with natural highlights, refined elegant facial features, gentle diffused lighting on the face.",
    "video_prompt": "[Scene]
At the entrance of a café under an awning on a rainy day. The awning covers the sidewalk. A shallow puddle rests on the ground in the foreground. The café entrance door stands closed, a large window on the right of the door, and a small menu board on the left. In the background, a misty city street with stationary passersby holding umbrellas. The entire scene remains static with no wind or movement.

[Characters]
Linh: Upper body of a young woman approximately twenty-three years old, heart-shaped face, almond eyes, refined nose, soft lips, arched brows, brown hair. She wears a light green top and cream cardigan, holding a pale blue umbrella. Emotional state: hesitant, questioning.
Minh: Upper body of a young man approximately twenty-five years old, angular face, sharp jawline, high cheekbones, slanted phoenix eyes, dark brown eyes, nose bridge, thin lips. Black short windswept hair. Wearing a dark blue hoodie and white t-shirt. Emotional state: attentive, still.

Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Shot, 2.01s): Static camera, environment unchanged.
Linh: "Or... are you going the same direction?"
Action: Slow-motion. Linh speaks softly, her lips moving gently, eyes fixed on Minh with a quiet questioning gaze. She hesitates slightly between words, a subtle tilt of her head, her fingers tightening almost imperceptibly on the umbrella handle. Minh remains motionless, attentive, a slow blink crossing his eyes."
  }
]

entries.parsedVideoPrompt:
[Scene]
At the entrance of a café under an awning on a rainy day. The awning covers the sidewalk. A shallow puddle rests on the ground in the foreground. The café entrance door stands closed, a large window on the right of the door, and a small menu board on the left. In the background, a misty city street with stationary passersby holding umbrellas. The entire scene remains static with no wind or movement.

[Characters]
Linh: Upper body of a young woman approximately twenty-three years old, heart-shaped face, almond eyes, refined nose, soft lips, arched brows, brown hair. She wears a light green top and cream cardigan, holding a pale blue umbrella. Emotional state: hesitant, questioning.
Minh: Upper body of a young man approximately twenty-five years old, angular face, sharp jawline, high cheekbones, slanted phoenix eyes, dark brown eyes, nose bridge, thin lips. Black short windswept hair. Wearing a dark blue hoodie and white t-shirt. Emotional state: attentive, still.

Shot 1 (Eye-Level Medium Shot, 2.01s): Static camera, environment unchanged.
Linh: "Or... are you going the same direction?"
Action: Slow-motion. Linh speaks softly, her lips moving gently, eyes fixed on Minh with a quiet questioning gaze. She hesitates slightly between words, a subtle tilt of her head, her fingers tightening almost imperceptibly on the umbrella handle. Minh remains motionless, attentive, a slow blink crossing his eyes.
